rules: session_open=true forbids resumable=true and forbids exception_reason.
resumable=true requires active_working_agent_id, resume_probe_attempted=true, and resume_probe_result=resumable.
exception_reason=agent_not_found requires active_working_agent_id, resume_probe_attempted=true, and resume_probe_result=agent_not_found.
exception_reason=tooling_recovery requires active_working_agent_id, resume_probe_attempted=true, and resume_probe_result=tooling_error.
ordinary working_rerun requires an active working baseline; missing active_working_agent_id is a caller-state error, not a fresh-spawn shortcut.
observational states such as wait_agent status=completed or verifier_evidence.final_state=completed are advisory only and must not by themselves imply session_completed_unresumable.
notes: This contract is caller-side normalization evidence for transition-resolver-input-v1.session.
The normalizer must derive exception_reason mechanically from explicit reuse checks instead of inferring it from prose or terminal-looking observer state.
